zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Umfraville於大約1277年出生在英國諾圖波藍德時，他的父親Gilbert de Umfraville 8th Earl of Angus33歲，母親Elizabeth Comyn30歲。他於1303年9月20日之前與Lucy Kyme結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1314年登記服兵役。他於1308年被列為joint lieutenant and guardian of scotland。他去世於1325年4月12日在他的家鄉享年49歲，埋葬在英國諾圖波藍德莫普斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Umfraville于大约1277年出生在英国諾圖波藍德时，他的父亲Gilbert de Umfraville 8th Earl of Angus33岁，母亲Elizabeth Comyn30岁。他于1303年9月20日之前与Lucy Kyme结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1314年登记服兵役。他于1308年被列为joint lieutenant and guardian of scotland。他去世于1325年4月12日在他的家乡享年49岁，埋葬在英国諾圖波藍德莫普斯。

nameMeanings.name: Umfraville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Umfreville (La Manche) or Offranville (Seine-Maritime).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Umfraville was born about 1277, in Northumberland, England, his father, Gilbert de Umfraville 8th Earl of Angus, was 33 and his mother, Elizabeth Comyn, was 30. He married Lucy Kyme before 20 September 1303. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He registered for military service in 1314. In 1308, at the age of 32, his occupation is listed as joint lieutenant and guardian of scotland. He died on 12 April 1325, in his hometown, at the age of 49, and was buried in Morpeth, Northumberland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Umfraville est né environ 1277, à Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Gilbert de Umfraville 8th Earl of Angus, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Comyn, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Lucy Kyme avant 20 septembre 1303. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1314. En 1308, à l’âge de 32 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est joint lieutenant and guardian of scotland. Il est décédé le 12 avril 1325, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Morpeth, Northumberland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Umfraville um 1277 in Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gilbert de Umfraville 8th Earl of Angus 33 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Comyn 30. Er hat vor 20. September 1303 Lucy Kyme geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er hat sich 1314 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1308, als er 32 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als joint lieutenant and guardian of scotland aufgeführt. Er starb am 12. April 1325 im Alter von 49 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Morpeth, Northumberland, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Umfraville è nato il circa 1277 nel Northumberland, England, il suo padre, Gilbert de Umfraville 8th Earl of Angus, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Comyn, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Lucy Kyme prima del 20 settembre 1303. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1314. Nel 1308, all'età di 32 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come joint lieutenant and guardian of scotland. Morì il 12 aprile 1325, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a Morpeth, Northumberland, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Umfravilleが約1277年にイギリスノースウンバーランドで生まれた時，父Gilbert de Umfraville 8th Earl of Angusは33歳，母Elizabeth Comynは30歳であった。1303年9月20日以前にLucy Kymeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1314年に兵役登録をした。1308年，32歳の時，職業はjoint lieutenant and guardian of scotlandと記録されている。彼は1325年4月12日に故郷で49歳で死去し，イギリスノースウンバーランドモーペスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Umfraville(이)가 대략 1277년 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gilbert de Umfraville 8th Earl of Angus(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Comyn(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1303년 9월 20일 이전 Lucy Kyme(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1314년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1308년, 32세의 나이로 그의 직업은 joint lieutenant and guardian of scotland이었다. 그는 1325년 4월 12일 그의 고향에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르스벌랜드 모르페스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Umfraville nasceu aproximadamente 1277, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Gilbert de Umfraville 8th Earl of Angus, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Comyn, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Lucy Kyme antes 20 de setembro de 1303. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1314. Em 1308, com 32 anos, sua profissão aparece como joint lieutenant and guardian of scotland. Ele faleceu em 12 de abril de 1325, em sua cidade natal, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Morpeth, Northumberland, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Umfraville родился около 1277 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Gilbert de Umfraville 8th Earl of Angus было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Comyn, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Lucy Kyme перед 20 сентябрь 1303 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. В 1314 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1308 году, в возрасте 32 лет, работал по профессии joint lieutenant and guardian of scotland. Он умер 12 апреля 1325 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности морпет, нортумбирланд, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Umfraville nació aproximadamente 1277, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Gilbert de Umfraville 8th Earl of Angus, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Comyn, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Lucy Kyme antes de 20 de septiembre de 1303. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1314. En 1308, a la edad de 32 años, su ocupación registrada era joint lieutenant and guardian of scotland. Murió el 12 de abril de 1325, en su pueblo, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en Morpeth, Northumberland, Inglaterra.
